title: padding changes
last_update: Done and waiting for the owner's approval. The Settings page now has breathing room in all three places you asked for: a blank row between the SETTINGS header and the tab strip (so the blue accent no longer touches the highlighted Updates tab), a blank row between the Check Now row and the Feature Request button, and a blank row between each role checkbox. While reviewing, we also raised the page's minimum screen height so a too-short monitor shows the honest 'screen too small' message instead of silently cutting off the bottom checkboxes. All tests pass.
changelog: Adds spacing on the Settings page between the header and tabs, around the Feature Request button, and between the role checkboxes.

log.m: Padding added in all three spots; suite green; whole-branch review done (one fix: honest min_h).
